title: Using both AND and OR Filters on dashboards and widgets
excerpt:

posts.author: dpweber74 (Dan Weber)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was surprised to find out that you cannot use a combination of AND and OR when creating advanced filters on a dashboard or widget.

I was trying to ensure that the widget was filtering on two fields, both of which exist both at the item and subitem level. To make this work I needed to set the conditions such that the two columns conditions were met at the item level, using AND, but also then at the subitem level which required an OR for the second part. However I was restricted to using AND all the way once set.

My workaround in the end was to set one of the conditions at the dashboard level on the connected boards and then the other condition at the widget level, but I got lucky. It seems to be basic functionality that you should be able to have both AND and OR in filters as otherwise it restricts users to only having one condition at the item and subitem level.

Please vote for this improvement.

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml:
